title: Re-ground after Feature 1.1.A
description:
## Objective
Close-out housekeeping for the feature.

## Implementation
1. Update .devmeta/project-history.md with an entry: what was built, files touched, anything surprising
2. Update .devmeta/increments/increment-1-kpv/iterations/iteration-1.1/status.md to mark Feature 1.1.A as complete
3. Append any lessons learned to .devmeta/lessons-learned.md (especially if supabase status JSON shape surprised us, or if any of the negative paths needed extra work)
4. Append a short section to .devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/context-log.md summarising what landed and any patterns the next iteration's worker should know
5. Run tk list --parent 5xi to confirm only iteration-level wrap-up tasks remain

## Tests
None — bookkeeping task.
Do NOT close until all four files are updated.
acceptance_criteria: project-history.md, status.md, lessons-learned.md, and context-log.md all updated
